articles.author: Lauren Forristal
articles.title: Users turn to jailbreaking their older Kindles as Amazon ends support - TechCrunch
articles.description: It may be possible to jailbreak an older, end-of-support Kindle and continue adding books to it. But doing so carries risks.
articles.content:
Many people are jailbreaking their Kindles following the news that Amazon is ending technical support for older models.
On May 20, Amazon will end support for the following Kindle devices:
